name: EcoRide: AI-Powered Sustainable Urban Mobility and Carbon Footprint Optimizer

parameters.subject: Your EcoRide Daily Commute Recommendations
parameters.html:
Hello,

Your optimized sustainable commute route:
  • Mode: {{$json["bestRoute"].travelMode}}
  • Distance: {{$json["bestRoute"].distanceKm}} km
  • Estimated Carbon Footprint: {{$json["bestRoute"].carbonFootprint.toFixed(2)}} kg CO2

Suggestions to reduce emissions:
    {{ $json["suggestions"].map(s => `
  • ${s}
    • `).join('') }}

Travel sustainably!

EcoRide Team

parameters.query: SELECT date, AVG(carbonFootprint) as avgCarbonFootprint, travelMode FROM eco_ride_commutes WHERE userId = {{$json["userId"]}} GROUP BY date, travelMode ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30;

parameters.html: EcoRide Dashboard: Carbon Footprint Trends
